channel.title: command line on
channel.description: Recent content in command line on

item.title: git snippets
item.description: Amending changes in a commit without modifying the message 1 git commit -a --amend --no-edit Displaying only the files modified in a commit 1 git show --pretty="" --name-status <commit-ref> Browsing the repository on a local web interface 1 git instaweb (It requires [[lighttpd]] or other httpd daemon.

item.title: grep
item.description: Find a string in all files of a folder ( source): 1 grep -nr '<string>' .

item.title: iterm2 notifications
item.description: We can get different triggers for post notifications when certain events happen in iterm2. When a a command finishes (even if it’s chained with other commands):
